recommendations.title: Big Legend
recommendations.overview: An ex-soldier ventures into the Pacific Northwest to uncover the truth behind his fiance's disappearance.

recommendations.title: Badland
recommendations.overview: Detective Matthias Breecher, hired to track down the worst of the Confederate war criminals, roams the Old West seeking justice. His resolve is tested when he meets a determined pioneer woman who is far more than she seems.

recommendations.title: Apache Junction
recommendations.overview: Apache Junction is an outpost of lawlessness, a haven for thieves and cold-blooded killers. After big-city reporter Annabelle Angel arrives to write an article on the town, she becomes a target when notorious gunslinger Jericho Ford comes to her aid.

recommendations.title: A Hard Day
recommendations.overview: After trying to cover up a car accident that left a man dead, a crooked homicide detective is stalked by a mysterious man claiming to have witnessed the event.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Return to Zombie Island
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy, Mystery, Horror
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and his pals win an all-expense paid vacation and embark on a trip of a lifetime to a tropical paradise. Their destination however, turns out to be Zombie Island. As soon as they arrive, they realize the place looks strangely familiar and

recommendations.title: Fear Island
recommendations.overview: Five students on spring break meet at a secluded island cabin for a weekend getaway. Stranded on the island they become the prey of a mysterious killer who seems bent on revenge for something the friends have done.

recommendations.title: Matango
recommendations.genres: Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller, Drama, Mystery, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Five vacationers and two crewmen become stranded on a tropical island near the equator. The island has little edible food for them to use as they try to live in a fungus covered hulk while repairing Kessei's yacht. Eventually they struggle over the f

recommendations.title: The Watchers
recommendations.overview: A young artist gets stranded in an extensive, immaculate forest in western Ireland, where, after finding shelter, she becomes trapped alongside three strangers, stalked by mysterious creatures each night.

recommendations.title: Happiness
recommendations.overview: The story of a rodent's unrelenting quest for happiness and fulfillment.

recommendations.title: Opera
recommendations.overview: A young opera singer is stalked by a deranged fan bent on killing the people associated with her to claim her for himself.
